final:
// // This module implements a 10-bit binary down-counter with disable and asynchronous reset.
module top_module
(
    input clk,
    input sreset,
    input enable,
    output reg [9:0] count
);always @(posedge clk)
        if (sreset) begin
            count <= 10'b0000000000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 10-bit binary down-counter with disable and asynchronous reset.
